# Nordish

*An arctic, north-bluish dark theme.*

| Field | Value |

---

## About

**Nordish** is a small, complete dark theme with an arctic, north-bluish
palette. It is the reference example for this repository: copy the folder,
swap the colours, and you have your own theme.

### Preview

<!-- Drop a screenshot in the folder and reference it here, e.g.:
![Nordish preview](preview.png)
Previews are recommended but not required. -->

> [!TIP]
> The full palette lives in `tokens/colors.json` inside the `.peltontheme`
> file. Unzip it, edit, re-zip — see the repository
> [CONTRIBUTING guide](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Credits

- Palette inspired by [Nord](https://www.nordtheme.com/) by Sven Greb.
- Maintained by the Pelton community.
